user_query: I want to gather all the news articles related to Bitcoin from various major news sites worldwide and specifically from CoinDesk.

TaskList.description: Search and retrieve the latest Bitcoin news articles from major news websites.
Filter the retrieved articles to include only those related to Bitcoin.
Extract and compile the titles, URLs, and sources from the filtered articles.
Gather news articles specifically related to Bitcoin from CoinDesk.
Compile a final report that includes all gathered Bitcoin articles, along with titles, URLs, and sources.
